headline: OOH Strategic Marketing Manager at Daktronics
summary: I’m passionate about the OOH industry, the shift in ad spend to OOH and digital advertising, and how they work together. I spend my days  marketing the benefits of LED technology and helping  OOH companies develop their business and ad sales strategies. My influences: live music, photography, painting, paper, sharpies, superheros, wine, my family…and everyone I meet.

experiences.title: Mobile & Modular Marketing
experiences.description: Develop and manage the implementation of marketing communications strategies, plans and tactics for the mobile and modular division of a world leading manufacturer of LED display systems. My efforts focus on the rental and staging industry: concert touring, award and auto shows, corporate events, festivals and sporting events, as well as rodeo, pari-mutuel and motorsports.

experiences.title: Strategic Marketing Manager
experiences.description: Strategic marketing for global out-of-home industry. Identify market needs, strategies, gaps and new business opportunities. Develop marketing initiatives, plans and analysis of results.

experiences.title: Team Manager
experiences.description: Supervised staff and provided ongoing training and support. Handled complex customer service issues and established and maintained customer relationships. Developed marketing campaigns to promote featured US Bank products and increase branch sales.

education.activities_and_societies: Activities and Societies: National Honor Society, Golden key International Honour Society

volunteer_work.title: Advisory Board Member
volunteer_work.description: WE.DOOH is a DPAA powered Initiative in partnership with Advance Women at Work, that unites the women working across the Digital Out-of-Home ecosystem. We harness and celebrate the talents and skills of women working in our industry, encourage and push for more representation at the podium, on panels, at events, and strive to engage younger generations of women to get interested and involved with DOOH! http://www.we-dooh.com
